mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT) AS TOTAL_PROJECT_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT WHERE STATUS IN ('ANALYSIS', 'DESIGN', 'DEVELOPMENT', 'TEST', 'INSPECTION', 'OPERATION') ) AS ACTIVE_PROJECT_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ISSUE) AS TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ISSUE WHERE DUE_DATE < #{today} AND STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') ) AS DELAYED_ISSUE_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEST_EVIDENCE WHERE RESULT_STATUS IN ('FAIL', 'BLOCKED') ) AS FAILED_TEST_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ISSUE WHERE COALESCE(ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(SPENT_MINUTES, 0) > COALESCE(ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) ) AS OVER_EFFORT_ISSUE_COUNT

SELECT I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.DUE_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, COALESCE(I.UPDATED_AT, I.CREATED_AT) AS UPDATED_AT FROM ISSUE I INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE I.DUE_DATE = #{today} AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') ORDER BY CASE I.PRIORITY WHEN 'URGENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, I.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.DUE_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, COALESCE(I.UPDATED_AT, I.CREATED_AT) AS UPDATED_AT FROM ISSUE I INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE I.DUE_DATE < #{today} AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') ORDER BY I.DUE_DATE ASC, CASE I.PRIORITY WHEN 'URGENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, I.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT WT.WBS_TASK_ID, WT.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, WT.WBS_CODE, WT.TASK_NAME, WT.STATUS, WT.PLAN_END_DATE, WT.PROGRESS_RATE, WT.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, WT.SPENT_MINUTES FROM WBS_TASK WT INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON WT.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE WT.PLAN_END_DATE < #{today} AND WT.STATUS <> 'DONE' ORDER BY WT.PLAN_END_DATE ASC, WT.WBS_CODE ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT TE.TEST_EVIDENCE_ID, TE.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, TE.TEST_NAME, TE.TEST_TARGET, TE.RESULT_STATUS, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS TESTER_NAME, TE.TESTED_AT, TE.SCREENSHOT_FILE_NAME FROM TEST_EVIDENCE TE INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON TE.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON TE.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN APP_USER U ON TE.TESTER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE TE.RESULT_STATUS IN ('FAIL', 'BLOCKED') ORDER BY TE.TESTED_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT VCL.CHANGE_LOG_ID, VCL.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, VCL.VCS_TYPE, VCL.REVISION_NO, VCL.AUTHOR, VCL.CHANGED_AT, VCL.MESSAGE, COALESCE(IK.ISSUE_KEY_TEXT, '') AS ISSUE_KEY_TEXT FROM VCS_CHANGE_LOG VCL INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON VCL.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ICLM.CHANGE_LOG_ID, STRING_AGG(I.ISSUE_KEY, ', ' ORDER BY I.ISSUE_KEY) AS ISSUE_KEY_TEXT FROM ISSUE_CHANGE_LOG_MAP ICLM INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON ICLM.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID GROUP BY ICLM.CHANGE_LOG_ID ) IK ON VCL.CHANGE_LOG_ID = IK.CHANGE_LOG_ID ORDER BY VCL.CHANGED_AT DESC NULLS LAST, VCL.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT P.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, P.STATUS, COALESCE(I.TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, 0) AS TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(I.DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, 0) AS DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(I.DELAYED_ISSUE_COUNT, 0) AS DELAYED_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) AS ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES, COALESCE(T.TEST_TOTAL_COUNT, 0) AS TEST_TOTAL_COUNT, COALESCE(T.TEST_SUCCESS_COUNT, 0) AS TEST_SUCCESS_COUNT, COALESCE(A.ARTIFACT_COUNT, 0) AS ARTIFACT_COUNT FROM PROJECT P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PROJECT_ID, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN DUE_DATE < #{today} AND STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DELAYED_ISSUE_COUNT, SUM(COALESCE(ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)) AS ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SUM(COALESCE(SPENT_MINUTES, 0)) AS SPENT_MINUTES FROM ISSUE GROUP BY PROJECT_ID ) I ON P.PROJECT_ID = I.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PROJECT_ID, COUNT(*) AS TEST_TOTAL_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN RESULT_STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TEST_SUCCESS_COUNT FROM TEST_EVIDENCE GROUP BY PROJECT_ID ) T ON P.PROJECT_ID = T.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PROJECT_ID, COUNT(*) AS ARTIFACT_COUNT FROM ARTIFACT_HISTORY GROUP BY PROJECT_ID ) A ON P.PROJECT_ID = A.PROJECT_ID ORDER BY CASE P.STATUS WHEN 'DEVELOPMENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'TEST' THEN 2 WHEN 'INSPECTION' THEN 3 WHEN 'ANALYSIS' THEN 4 WHEN 'DESIGN' THEN 5 WHEN 'OPERATION' THEN 6 WHEN 'READY' THEN 7 WHEN 'HOLD' THEN 8 WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN 9 ELSE 10 END, P.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT STATUS, COUNT(*) AS ISSUE_COUNT FROM ISSUE WHERE STATUS IN ('REGISTERED', 'ANALYZING', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'DEV_DONE', 'TESTING', 'DONE') GROUP BY STATUS

SELECT I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.DUE_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, COALESCE(I.UPDATED_AT, I.CREATED_AT) AS UPDATED_AT FROM ISSUE I INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE I.STATUS IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') ORDER BY I.RESOLVED_DATE DESC NULLS LAST, COALESCE(I.UPDATED_AT, I.CREATED_AT) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT TE.TEST_EVIDENCE_ID, TE.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, TE.TEST_NAME, TE.TEST_TARGET, TE.RESULT_STATUS, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS TESTER_NAME, TE.TESTED_AT, TE.SCREENSHOT_FILE_NAME FROM TEST_EVIDENCE TE INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON TE.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON TE.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN APP_USER U ON TE.TESTER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY TE.TESTED_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT AH.ARTIFACT_ID, AH.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, AH.ARTIFACT_TYPE, AH.FILE_NAME, AH.GENERATED_AT FROM ARTIFACT_HISTORY AH INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON AH.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID ORDER BY AH.GENERATED_AT DESC LIMIT 5
